case_title: MIKE GARZA VS. IGOR VASEY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-01-2006 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-17-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-01-2006 CONTINUED TO JUL-31-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST ARLO H. SMITH, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-01-2006, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-16-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DAVE DAVENPORT, CSR#1694. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
